steps.name: Given  I am on the Sauce Demo homepage
Then  I should see the link "Search" in the footer navigation
And  I should see the link "About Us" in the footer navigation

labels.name: story
labels.value: Verify footer navigation displays all expected links

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Verify footer navigation displays all expected links
